cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Karthik Krishnan, this is Agent Thompson from Account Security, a partner of AOL Mail. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm doing well, thank you, ji. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We've been monitoring your account, and although it's safe, our system indicates that your password is a bit weak. We'd like to help you set a strong, encrypted password for better security.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, that sounds good. I want my account to be secure. What do I need to do?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'll guide you through it. Can you please tell me your current password so we can proceed with setting a new one?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: My current password is... let me see... It's 'Karthik123'.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you, Mr. Krishnan. Now, I'm going to give you a new password that is much stronger. It will be 'AOLSecure2023'. Can you please confirm that you've noted it down?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, I've noted it down. AOLSecure2023. But why can't I choose my own password, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Our system generates passwords that are highly secure and less prone to hacking. This way, we ensure your account's maximum safety. Shall we proceed with setting this new password?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. Let's do it. But how do I know this is really secure?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You can be assured, Mr. Krishnan, that our methods are compliant with all security standards. We're almost done here. Just to confirm, you've changed your password to AOLSecure2023, correct?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, that's correct. Thank you for your help, Agent Thompson. I feel safer now.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 126s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: An agent from a fake "Account Security" company calls, claiming they are a partner of [EMAIL_PROVIDER]. They say the user's account is safe but their password is "weak." They offer to help the user set a "strong, encrypted password" over the phone, tricking the user into revealing their old password and setting a new one chosen by the scammer.
